title: FLAT 40% off on Every Monday & Tuesday
description:

* Campaign Period: During Ramadan (Monday & Tuesday Only).
* Valid From 27th Feb-2026 onwards till Chand Raat.
* Offer valid on one card per day.
* Offer valid on all HBL Debit & Credit Cards.
* Discount Applicable on Dining & Takeaway.
* The discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions, discount programmes or vouchers defined by HBL or alliance partners.
* The discounts cannot be combined with group discounts, parties, special events or any other offers.

* HBL will not be responsible for any complaint or liability whatsoever that arises with respect to items and services availed on the mentioned partners.

title: 20% off on Every Wednesday
description:
* Discount will be valid only on Mastercard Platinum Debit Card on 515724 BIN only
* Discount will be valid only on Mastercard Gold Credit Card on 523821 BIN only
* 20% or Rs. 2,000 whichever is lower 
* Only one card can be avail discount per day
* Only one card can be charged 6 times in a month
* The Bank may together with the Alliance Partners, offer discounts from time to time, as part of promotion schemes for the Cardholders. However, the Alliance Partners have full authority to refuse any promotional offers, and the Bank shall not be liable to the Cardholder for any such refusal.
* Only (01) One Discount transaction is allowed on offer day and total (4) Four Discount transactions in a Calendar month per card.
* Split of transactions are not allowed for discount offer.
* Any other discount transaction monitored same day,will be charged back in monthly account statement of customer.
* Bank Offers including Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives that are discretionary, and the Cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* Bank is entitled at any time without any liability to the Cardholder in any manner whatsoever to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria and conditions for these discounts, promotional offers, and incentives. 
* The Cardholders may be entitled to discounts mentioned above in respect to payments made at the mentioned Alliance Partners through their BOP Credit Card /Debit Card. This entitlement is not applicable in respect of cash transactions. 
* The aforementioned discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions, discount programs or vouchers defined by the Bank or Alliance Partners.
* All Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives are subject to the specific category of the card bins (Gold, Platinum, or World). The cardholder of each category will only be able to enjoy the Offers of the card he/she holds and not any other. 
* The terms of our banking agreement apply to each use of a Credit/Debit card. If a cardholder does not agree with those terms, they should not sign the credit card or carry out any transaction. 
* Cardholder accepts the terms of our banking agreement when he/she first use the Debit/credit card.

title: 40% off
description:
* The discount offers are for ABL cardholders for the promotion of ABL respective Cards.
* 40% Discount is capped to PKR 4,000 per transaction.
* Introduction of Fair Usage Terms & Conditions (T&C) for Premium & Infinite Debit Card Discounts; 
  * a. To ensure fair and equitable utilization of discount offers, Allied Bank has introduced Fair Usage Terms & Conditions for Premium and Infinite Debit Card discounts. These terms and conditions have been duly aligned to promote responsible and transparent usage of discount privileges.
  * b. To prevent misuse of card/discounts and its commercial use by the cardholder, the Bank reserves the right to monitor card transactions for excessive or disproportionate usage of discount or promotional offers and can impose any threshold per month consequent to this monitoring. The Bank may, at its sole discretion and without prior notice, restrict, suspend, or cancel the Card and/or withdraw the applicable benefits/discounts. The Bank’s determination of excessive/commercial usage or misuse shall be final and binding, and the Cardholder shall have no right to claim or any recourse in this regard.
  * c. To ensure fair usage of the discount, only one transaction per card per day is allowed at a single alliance partner. Additionally, a maximum of 3 transactions per card per alliances partner are eligible for the discount in a month. If more than 3 transactions are made, the bank reserves the right to charge or recover the full amount of discount from the card holder for any additional transactions.
* Allied Bank Cardholders may be entitled to the discount offers in respect of payments made at the selected Merchants and Alliance Partners through their Allied (Visa, UPI-PayPak) Cards including Credit & Debit cards. The discount offers are not applicable in respect of cash transactions.
* Allied Bank is entitled at any time without any liability to the cardholder in any manner whatsoever to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria and conditions for any or all the discounts and/or promotional offers.
* The discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions and/or discount programs defined by Allied Bank, Merchants and Alliance Partners.
* Allied Bank specific card discounts and/or promotional offers are discretionary and the cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* The Merchants / Alliance Partners reserve the right to refuse or cancel discount for any unforeseen reason or circumstances including but not limited to misuse of discount / multiple transaction on a single card at any given time.
* For any further information, please call Helpline at: 042-111-225-225.

title: 50% off on Every Wednesday
description:
* Discount will be valid only on World Credit Card on 523819 BIN only
* 50% or Rs. 6,000 whichever is lower 
* Only one card can be avail discount per day
* Only one card can be charged 6 times in a month
* The Bank may together with the Alliance Partners, offer discounts from time to time, as part of promotion schemes for the Cardholders. However, the Alliance Partners have full authority to refuse any promotional offers, and the Bank shall not be liable to the Cardholder for any such refusal.
* Only (01) One Discount transaction is allowed on offer day and total (4) Four Discount transactions in a Calendar month per card.
* Split of transactions are not allowed for discount offer.
* Any other discount transaction monitored same day,will be charged back in monthly account statement of customer.
* Bank Offers including Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives that are discretionary, and the Cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* Bank is entitled at any time without any liability to the Cardholder in any manner whatsoever to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria and conditions for these discounts, promotional offers, and incentives. 
* The Cardholders may be entitled to discounts mentioned above in respect to payments made at the mentioned Alliance Partners through their BOP Credit Card /Debit Card. This entitlement is not applicable in respect of cash transactions. 
* The aforementioned discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions, discount programs or vouchers defined by the Bank or Alliance Partners.
* All Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives are subject to the specific category of the card bins (Gold, Platinum, or World). The cardholder of each category will only be able to enjoy the Offers of the card he/she holds and not any other. 
* The terms of our banking agreement apply to each use of a Credit/Debit card. If a cardholder does not agree with those terms, they should not sign the credit card or carry out any transaction. 
* Cardholder accepts the terms of our banking agreement when he/she first use the Debit/credit card.
